properties.name: Late Reply (Talent)
properties.description: Battle skill Arcane Staff: Gravity Mode and combo skill Arcane Staff: Matrix Displacement improved: Hitting at least 2 enemies with either the combo skill or the last sequence of the battle skill restores [108 + Intellect×0.90] HP to the controlled operator. If the controlled operator is already at max HP, then restore the HP of the teammate with lowest percentage HP.
